sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Character Special Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Each character has energy-based special attack. Garth summons U.S. Air Force starship that drops bombs; Karen calls nuclear missile incinerating all on-screen foes; Scooter teleports and leaves bomb series. Energy depletes significantly per use.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Three characters have individual short-range weapons. Garth has lightning weapon (flame in Master System), unlimited short-range attacks (punches, kicks). Energy powers weapon-based attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Perspective Shift Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: At mission end, gameplay shifts to shooting gallery perspective or horizontal running section with projectile weapons, similar to Shinobi bonus stages.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is side-scrolling beat-em-up with arcade origins; movement mechanics not formally documented. Wikipedia source covers gameplay systems and character abilities but lacks physics quantification.
